title: Define use-case error variants
scenario: The application layer can compose domain and repository errors without leaking adapter response details.
instructions: Keep the domain and repository errors from the starter. Define CreateOrderUseCaseError with Domain(CreateOrderError) and Repository(RepositoryError).

hints.body: Add a public CreateOrderUseCaseError enum; do not replace CreateOrderError or RepositoryError.
The Domain variant should carry CreateOrderError, and the Repository variant should carry RepositoryError.
One complete solution for Define use-case error variants is shown below.

completionExplanation: CreateOrderUseCaseError now composes domain and repository failures without introducing adapter details.
